scope: Pass B full-surface expansion: fetched ActiveCampaign's documentation index (developers.activecampaign.com/llms.txt) plus individual reference pages (each embeds a per-operation OpenAPI 3.1 fragment) for every core CRM resource. Covered: 8 GET list streams (contacts, lists, deals, campaigns plus 4 new: tags, automations, fields, accounts, users, deal_stages, deal_tasks). ActiveCampaign remains write-capability-false: every documented create/update endpoint on every resource in this API wraps its request body in a resource-named top-level JSON envelope (confirmed directly from each reference page's example request body — e.g. POST /contacts is {"contact": {...}}, POST /deals is {"deal": {...}}, POST /tags is {"tag": {...}}, POST /contactTags is {"contactTag": {...}}), and this dialect's body_type json/form/none construction always sends record fields flat at the top level with no envelope-wrapping mechanism (conventions.md §3, "Write body construction") -- a genuine, universal ENGINE_GAP across every mutating endpoint in this API, not a per-endpoint gap. Every create/update/delete endpoint below is therefore excluded out_of_scope with the ENGINE_GAP reason (matching the sanctioned veeqo/statuspage/solarwinds-service-desk precedent for the identical envelope-body class of gap) rather than shipping a write action that would silently send the wrong wire shape.

excluded.reason: single-contact detail subsumed by the contacts list stream

ENGINE_GAP: ActiveCampaign's contact-create body is a nested envelope ({"contact": {...fieldValues...}}); the dialect's write body construction always sends record fields flat at the top level with no envelope-wrapping mechanism, so a correct create_contact action cannot be expressed declaratively without silently diverging from the real wire shape
ENGINE_GAP: contact update shares the same nested contact-envelope body shape as create; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
permanently deletes a contact and its associated activity history
ENGINE_GAP: the upsert-by-email sync endpoint shares the same nested {"contact": {...}} envelope body shape as create/update
per-contact automation-membership sub-resource with no top-level list endpoint of its own; would require per-contact fan_out this pass does not scope
per-contact tag-membership sub-resource with no top-level list endpoint of its own; same per-parent fan_out reasoning as contactAutomations
ENGINE_GAP: applying a tag to a contact wraps the body in a nested {"contactTag": {...}} envelope; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
removes a tag assignment from a contact
single-list detail subsumed by the lists list stream
ENGINE_GAP: list-create body is a nested {"list": {...}} envelope; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
ENGINE_GAP: list update shares the same nested envelope shape as create
permanently deletes a list and its subscriber associations
single-deal detail subsumed by the deals list stream
ENGINE_GAP: ActiveCampaign's deal-create body is a nested envelope ({"deal": {...fields...}}); not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
ENGINE_GAP: deal update shares the same nested deal-envelope body shape as create
permanently deletes a deal and its pipeline history
per-deal notes sub-resource with no top-level list endpoint of its own; would require per-deal fan_out this pass does not scope
ENGINE_GAP: note-create body is a nested {"note": {...}} envelope; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
single-campaign detail subsumed by the campaigns list stream
ENGINE_GAP: campaign-create body is a nested {"campaign": {...}} envelope; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
permanently deletes a campaign, including sent-campaign performance history
single-tag detail subsumed by the tags list stream
ENGINE_GAP: tag-create body is a nested {"tag": {...}} envelope; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
ENGINE_GAP: tag update shares the same nested envelope shape as create
permanently deletes a tag and removes it from every contact it was applied to
single-automation detail subsumed by the automations list stream
permanently deletes an automation and removes every contact currently enrolled in it
single-custom-field detail subsumed by the fields list stream
ENGINE_GAP: custom-field-create body is a nested {"field": {...}} envelope; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
per-contact custom-field-value collection with no useful top-level unfiltered list endpoint; would require per-contact fan_out this pass does not scope
ENGINE_GAP: field-value-create body is a nested {"fieldValue": {...}} envelope; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
single-account detail subsumed by the accounts list stream
ENGINE_GAP: account-create body is a nested {"account": {...}} envelope; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
ENGINE_GAP: account update shares the same nested envelope shape as create
permanently deletes an account and its contact/deal associations
single-user detail subsumed by the users list stream
single-deal-stage detail subsumed by the deal_stages list stream
deal pipeline (group) container objects; deal_stages already surfaces each stage's parent group id, and pipelines are a low-cardinality admin-configuration list rarely needed independently of stages
single-deal-task detail subsumed by the deal_tasks list stream

permanently deletes a scheduled deal task
asynchronous CSV/bulk-file contact import job; a batch-file upload workflow, not a per-record declarative write
bulk-import job status polling; tied to the deferred bulk-import feature above
ENGINE_GAP: webhook-create body is a nested {"webhook": {...}} envelope; not expressible without an envelope-wrapping write dialect
operator-configured webhook-subscription list, not customer-facing CRM catalog data; low value as a sync stream
saved-segment definitions are a niche admin-configuration list with a large, deeply nested JSON-structure surface; deferred pending real demand
third-party e-commerce connection metadata (Shopify/WooCommerce link records), not core CRM catalog data
e-commerce order sync data requires a configured storefront connection (see /connections above); deferred alongside it
